# Narrative Protocol - LLMs Full Reference

## 1) Overview
Narrative Protocol is a World State and Event Engine for defining worlds, versioning event behavior, executing events (AI or direct), and recording verifiable execution history.

Base URL:
`https://api.narrativeprotocol.com`

Health:
`GET /health`

## 2) Authentication

### API routes
All `/api/*` routes require:
`Authorization: Bearer <api-key>`

Notes:
- Debug auth flow is removed.
- Missing/invalid token returns `401`.

### Public app route
`/app/*` routes do not require API key and instead use wallet signature validation.

## 3) Route Model

The API uses world-scoped nested routes for entity schemas, events, deployments, bindings, and instances.

Removed legacy top-level routes:
- `/api/entity-schemas`
- `/api/events`
- `/api/deployments`
- `/api/entity-instances`
- `/api/event-bindings`

## 4) Worlds

Endpoints:
- `GET /api/worlds?page=1&limit=20`
- `POST /api/worlds`
- `GET /api/worlds/:idOrAddress`
- `PUT /api/worlds/:idOrAddress`
- `DELETE /api/worlds/:idOrAddress`
- `POST /api/worlds/:idOrAddress/publish`
- `POST /api/worlds/:idOrAddress/unpublish`

> Note: World paths support both numeric ID and hex address.

Create world body:
```json
{
  "name": "Horse Racing",
  "description": "A horse racing simulation world",
  "domainTags": ["sports", "simulation"],
  "promptSeed": "This world simulates realistic horse racing events."
}
```

Update world body (all optional):
```json
{
  "name": "Horse Racing v2",
  "description": "Updated description",
  "domainTags": ["sports", "simulation", "strategy"],
  "promptSeed": "Updated world guidance"
}
```

## 5) Entity Schemas and Attributes

### Entity Schemas (world-scoped)
Endpoints:
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldAddress/entity-schemas?page=1&limit=20`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldAddress/entity-schemas`

Create schema body:
```json
{
  "name": "horse",
  "description": "A racing horse",
  "attributes": [
    {
      "name": "speed_rating",
      "type": "float",
      "constraints": { "min": 0, "max": 1 },
      "defaultValue": 0.5
    }
  ]
}
```

### Attributes (schema-scoped)
Endpoints:
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldAddress/entity-schemas/:schemaName/attributes?page=1&limit=20`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldAddress/entity-schemas/:schemaName/attributes`
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldAddress/entity-schemas/:schemaName/attributes/:name`
- `PUT /api/worlds/:worldAddress/entity-schemas/:schemaName/attributes/:name`
- `DELETE /api/worlds/:worldAddress/entity-schemas/:schemaName/attributes/:name`

Create attribute body:
```json
{
  "name": "wins",
  "type": "integer",
  "constraints": { "min": 0 },
  "defaultValue": 0
}
```

Validation notes:
- Attribute `type`: `integer | float | string | boolean | json`.
- Entity schema name is unique

## 6) Events and Event Versions

### Events (world-scoped)
Endpoints:
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldAddress/events?page=1&limit=20`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldAddress/events`

Create event body:
```json
{
  "name": "race_result",
  "description": "Resolves a race and updates horse stats",
  "firstVersion": {
    "inputSchema": { "raceId": "string" },
    "outputSchema": { "winner": "string", "time": "string" },
    "readEntities": [{ "schema": "horse" }],
    "stateChanges": { "horse": "partial" },
    "behaviorPrompt": "Determine the race winner based on horse speed ratings.",
    "mutationSettings": { "mode": "ai" },
    "executionSettings": { "visibility": "admin" }
  }
}
```

### Event versions (event-scoped)
Endpoints:
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldAddress/events/:eventName/event-versions?page=1&limit=20`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldAddress/events/:eventName/event-versions`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldAddress/events/:eventName/event-versions/:version/publish`

Create event version body:
```json
{
  "inputSchema": { "raceId": "string", "weather": "string" },
  "outputSchema": { "winner": "string", "time": "string", "weather": "string" },
  "readEntities": [{ "schema": "horse", "filter": ["eq:instanceId:HORSE_1"] }],
  "stateChanges": { "horse": "partial" },
  "behaviorPrompt": "Consider weather conditions.",
  "mutationSettings": {
    "mode": "direct",
    "template": { "result": { "winner": "{{input.winner}}" } }
  },
  "executionSettings": {
    "visibility": "cron",
    "cron": { "schedule": "*/5 * * * *", "input": { "tick": "{{counter}}" } }
  }
}
```

Field migration summary:
- `reads` -> `readEntities`
- `stateChangeSchema` -> `stateChanges`
- `resultSchema` -> `outputSchema`
- `firstBinding` -> `bindings` (array, per-binding onchain config)

Validation notes:
- `mutationSettings.mode = "direct"` requires `mutationSettings.template`.
- `executionSettings.visibility` values: `admin | public | cron`.
- If visibility is `cron`, `executionSettings.cron.schedule` must be valid cron.

### Concurrent Execution Lock

Events use a mutex (mutual exclusion) lock to prevent race conditions when multiple executions target the same entity data. An event cannot execute concurrently if:

1. **Same event** - The identical event is already executing on the deployment
2. **Shared entity schema** - Any entity schema is both read by the new event and modified by a running event (via `readEntities` or `stateChanges`)

```
eventA.readEntities ∩ eventB.stateChanges ≠ ∅
```

This ensures data consistency when events modify overlapping entities. If a conflicting execution is in progress, the new execution request will fail with a 409 conflict error.

## 7) Deployments

Endpoints:
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldAddress/deployments?page=1&limit=20`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldAddress/deployments`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldAddress/deployments/:address/execute`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldAddress/deployments/:address/lock`
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldAddress/deployments/:address/history?page=1&limit=10`
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldAddress/deployments/:address/event-bindings`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldAddress/deployments/:address/event-bindings`
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldAddress/deployments/:address/entity-instances?entitySchema=horse&page=1&limit=20`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldAddress/deployments/:address/entity-instances`

Create deployment body:
```json
{
  "name": "Season 1",
  "description": "Runtime deployment",
  "mode": "upgradable",
  "aiModelId": "openai/gpt-oss-120b",
  "isLLMPublic": false,
  "payToAddress": "6Q2...wallet",
  "bindings": [{
    "event": "race_result",
    "eventVersion": 1,
    "targetChains": ["near-testnet"],
    "onchain": {
      "stateChanges": ["wins", "speed_rating"],
      "result": ["winner"]
    }
  }],
  "sourceDeployment": "0x123...abc"
}
```

Notes:
- `mode`: `upgradable | locked`.
- `targetChains` (per binding): `solana-devnet | solana-mainnet | near-testnet | near-mainnet`.
- `payToAddress` is the settlement receiver for paid public execution.

### Execute event (admin)
`POST /api/worlds/:worldAddress/deployments/:address/execute`

Body:
```json
{
  "event": "race_result",
  "input": { "raceId": "RACE_001" }
}
```

Response commonly includes:
- `historyId`
- `eventVersion`
- `stateChanges`
- `result`
- `attestation`
- `oracle` (`solana`, `near`)

## 8) Event Bindings

Endpoints:
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldAddress/deployments/:address/event-bindings`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldAddress/deployments/:address/event-bindings`

Binding body:
```json
{
  "event": "race_result",
  "eventVersion": 2,
  "targetChains": ["near-testnet"],
  "onchain": {
    "stateChanges": ["wins", "speed_rating"],
    "result": ["winner"]
  }
}
```

Rules:
- Bound event must belong to the same world.
- Only published event versions can be bound.
- `targetChains` is optional and specifies which chains to push on-chain.
- `onchain` config is optional and controls which fields get pushed to blockchain.

## 9) Entity Instances

Endpoints:
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldAddress/deployments/:address/entity-instances?entitySchema=horse`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldAddress/deployments/:address/entity-instances`

Create instance body:
```json
{
  "entitySchema": "horse",
  "instanceId": "HORSE_1",
  "state": {
    "name": "Midnight Comet",
    "speed_rating": 0.85
  }
}
```

## 10) Public Execution (Wallet)

Endpoint:
`POST /app/deployments/:address/execute`

Body:
```json
{
  "event": "race_result",
  "input": { "raceId": "RACE_001" },
  "wallet": "<solana-wallet>",
  "signature": "<base58-signature>",
  "message": "narrativeprotocol:<deploymentAddress>:<eventName>:<timestamp>"
}
```

Rules:
- Deployment must expose a publicly executable event version.
- Event version must have `executionSettings.visibility = "public"`.
- If `executionSettings.priceUsd > 0`, include `X-Payment` (x402).

## 11) Cron Execution

Event versions can run on cron when:
- `executionSettings.visibility = "cron"`
- `executionSettings.cron.schedule` is a valid cron expression

Optional:
- `executionSettings.cron.input` template is resolved at runtime.

## 12) AI Models

Endpoint:
- `GET /api/ai-models`

Use returned `modelId` when creating deployments via `aiModelId`.

## 13) Common Errors

Status codes:
- `400` validation error
- `401` unauthorized
- `402` payment required (priced public execution)
- `403` forbidden
- `404` not found
- `409` conflict

## 14) Quick End-to-End

1. `POST /api/worlds`
2. `POST /api/worlds/:worldAddress/entity-schemas`
3. `POST /api/worlds/:worldAddress/events`
4. `POST /api/worlds/:worldAddress/deployments`
5. `POST /api/worlds/:worldAddress/deployments/:address/entity-instances`
6. `POST /api/worlds/:worldAddress/deployments/:address/execute`
